commands.name: Type check
commands.fix: Run `npm run typecheck` and fix the TypeScript errors.

commands.name: Obsidian command contract drift
commands.fix: Run `npm run commands:emit` and commit the updated contract/obsidian-commands.json.

commands.name: Plugin version drift
commands.fix: Run `npm run version:sync` and commit manifest.json + versions.json (package.json is the canonical version).
